TransformRule: As-is; pattern RAE-NNNNN
Notes: Canonical identifier; Registry uses same internal name

TransformRule: As-is; derivation: manifest Title -> link_text -> original_filename -> path stem
Notes: Registry adds RAE_Title internal name (non-built-in)

TransformRule: Map taxonomy slug to Choice values; SharePoint free text -> Registry choice list
Notes: SharePoint stores slug text; Registry uses Choice column limited to taxonomy values

TransformRule: As-is; Thai subcategory name from manifest
Notes: Optional in registry; populated from manifest

TransformRule: SharePoint text -> Registry Person/Group column. TBD is NOT valid in Registry.
Notes: Registry uses native Person/Group column for governance. TBD only allowed in SharePoint during migration.

TransformRule: SharePoint values (LegacyImported/Draft/Current/Obsolete/Archived/MetadataOnly) map to canonical registry vocabulary: draft/review/approved/published/current/obsolete/archived. Migration conditions use SourceSystem and MigrationStatus.
Notes: See lifecycle-model.md for mapping. LegacyImported and MetadataOnly are NOT lifecycle Status values.

TransformRule: As-is; semantic version {major}.{minor}
Notes: Optional field; default 1.0

TransformRule: As-is; YYYY-MM-DD format
Notes: CORE field

TransformRule: SharePoint Managed Metadata -> Registry semicolon-separated text. Lossy: hierarchy not preserved.
Notes: Registry cannot use Managed Metadata natively. Text column with semicolon delimiters.

TransformRule: SharePoint values (PendingReview/Public/Internal/Restricted) map to canonical registry vocabulary: public/internal/restricted/private.
Notes: PendingReview is NOT a registry Visibility. Documents awaiting review use Status=review + Visibility=internal.

TransformRule: As-is; original WTMS URL may be dead link
Notes: Dead/internal URL preserved for traceability only; not publicly exported

TransformRule: As-is; free text max 1000 chars
Notes: Internal governance notes; NOT public export

TransformRule: As-is; references primary DocumentID
Notes: Integration field for 45 duplicate-linked migration records

TransformRule: Not mapped; file integrity field has no registry purpose
Notes: SharePoint-only field. Registry does not need file hash.

TransformRule: Not mapped; migration tracking field has no registry purpose
Notes: SharePoint-only field. Migration status is not operational governance metadata.

Notes: Governance-only field; not publicly exported

TransformRule: Auto-incremented for sync change detection
